title: !!DISCONTINUED!! FNAF:MW Modern Spawn Egg Designs
description: A touch-up to FNaF:MW's spawn eggs
body:
**This pack will no longer be updated as the coming update to the mod will feature new spawn egg designs**

The Minecraft mod FNaF: Management Wanted is really cool! However, the mod has a ton of spawn eggs, all of which are very similar to eachother, and that can really make it easy to confuse some spawn eggs for others

To help with this, I've created a texture pack to replace these spawn eggs with 162 unique designs for each animatronic in a similar style to the current day spawn egg update. 

I hope you appreciate this pack as I would

[FNaF: Management Wanted](https://modrinth.com/mod/management-wanted) (I am NOT affiliated with OVDR or anybody else involved with FNaF MW, im just a big fan)

[My Bluesky account](https://bsky.app/profile/thegayestvivian.bsky.social) where you can DM me if theres an issue
